title: proteocarpus atrofuscus
intro: Proteocarpus atrofuscus is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the coffee or madder family. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, with its roots and leaves exhibiting anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Proteocarpus atrofuscus include the treatment of various conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing its leaves and roots in hot water, or as a decoction by boiling the roots in water to make a medicinal infusion.
